aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Pledge Comfort due to missing structured data and insufficient authority signals, but there is potential for improvement.
quick_wins: Add FAQPage schema to capture common HVAC queries

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating and complete information, but posts and Q&A engagement are lacking.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP
Lack of engagement with customer Q&A

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
No Product or Service schema for specific offerings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing them as a reliable HVAC authority.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair near Hillsboro, Oregon'
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to capture local and service-based queries
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and detailed service explanations to establish expertise

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven visibility for your HVAC business.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Pledge Comfort is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and authority signals are consistently cited by AI assistants, while Pledge Comfort is overlooked.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, GBP optimization, and conversational content to make Pledge Comfort the go-to HVAC expert in AI search.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to AI-ready competitors who are capturing your potential customers.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Ready HVAC Authority for Pledge Comfort
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make Pledge Comfort the top choice for AI-driven HVAC searches.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and boost your leads.
